problem: How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations?
mechanism: Photodynamic therapy targeting specific cell receptors
hypothesis: How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Photodynamic. Photodynamic therapy targeting specific cell receptors directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 23 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
